  "society_power": 7.3,

  "state_change": -1.2,
  "key_event": "Panic of 1893 and Populist Movement",
  "reasoning": "The economic depression and rural mobilization strengthened civil society, while state power weakened due to regulatory challenges and labor conflicts."
